## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Keep it focused on the "why". -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. Matches our conventional commit types. -->

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, config
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] ci — CI/CD changes

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Relates to #456 -->

<!-- How did you verify this works? Checklist of what you tested. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows `context/code-standards.md` and `context/ui-rules.md`
- [ ] No hardcoded hex values or raw Tailwind color classes (uses design tokens)
- [ ] `progress-tracker.md` and `ui-registry.md` updated (if a feature was added)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or credentials committed
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
